title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 41.400 - Enlisted men — transfers
text:
41.400.  Enlisted men — transfers. — Enlisted men may be transferred to or from organizations, departments or arms and services as provided in regulations for the governing of the Armed Forces of the United States.
(RSMo 1939 § 15034, A.L. 1951 p. 654 § 61) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 13841; 1919 § 7369
